title: Project Miner Local Field Questions Draft
objective: Reduce PM-to-lead and PM-to-field relay burden by adding a browser-local field questions draft to the Project Miner intake workbench, while preserving that it is prep context only and not a task, issue, work authorization, assignment, schedule, status, approval, import, or production write.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Field-Prep Implementer
implemented_scope: Add a Local Field Questions Draft to /pm-review/import-intake.
Persist draft state only in candidate-scoped browser localStorage.
Include field questions draft text in the browser-local Field Kickoff Brief.
Include field questions draft text in the browser-local PM brief.
Extend the focused import-intake smoke to prove localStorage state, clear behavior, exported content, exact four read seams, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for field-question wording and draft review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "ready for field|ready for execution|released|cleared|approved|accepted|authorized|go/no-go passed|dispatch|customer confirmed|JHA complete|LOTO approved|material released|issue created|task created|work order|production-ready" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
Prohibited field-release wording scan passed with no matches after tightening one inherited read-only handoff phrase and one test variable name.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed after aligning a visible text assertion.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
